title: Minecraft Trailer Recreation by Georgefatpotato
description: Yet simple but unique Trailer Recreation
body:
This Modpack brings a unique experiece in Minecraft, adding new (150+) Biomes all created with vanilla blocks and many structures with loot. It also offers a Huge improvement in the 2 Dimensions,  
Adding 15+ biomes and new structures in each one. Explore limitless and exciting World Generation with the Terralith mod. Complementary Shaders, customly edited by me, makes this modpack look and feel like the trailers! You can aslo experiencce this Modpack with any of your friends, with the Essential Mod! If you encounter any issues, send an email at georgefatpotatodoublefat@gmail.com

_**SYTEM REQUIREMENTS**_
```
- Graphics Card: Nvidia GTX 1660 Super and upper / AMD radeon RX 580 and upper
- Processor: AMD Ryzen 3 Third generation and upper / Intel Core i3 Tenth generation and upper
- RAM: ATLEAST 16 gigabytes of DDR4 RAM and upper
- Storage: 10 gigabytes of space ( I recommend and SSD and not an HDD) 
```
